productDisplayName: BIBA Women Printed Olive Green Kurta
description: Composition Olive green mix-and-match printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck, mock button placket with sequin detailing, red piping along the neck and placket, three-quarter sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the mix-and-match print adds zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or pyjamas, chunky accessories and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
